titleStmt.title: SII 18.227: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 227. (B.K. No. 57 of 1932-33.) HARAḶAHAḶḶI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the backyard of Mallappa Baṇakāra.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription gives a descriptive genealogy of the Yādava family up to Siṁghaṇa and of Daṇḍanāyaka Bīchi-seṭṭi. It is noteworthy that the latter and his wife are stated to be together ruling Beḷuvala Two-six-hundred and other regions. The division Beḷuhige seventy is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē © toḷaguva himagiriśikharadoḷaḷavaḍuvantiṭṭa nīḷamaṇi kaḷaśadavōli
ḷe tudigōḍoḷsale kaṇgoḷipādivarāhanosa(se)du poregurbbareyaṁ . v® . sāśvata mūrtti śaṁbhu paripāḷisutirkke samastaprithviyaṁ viśvapati prasannayajamānamahī
gaganānaḷēṁdu saptāśvapayarppa(ḥpra)bhaṁjana samaṁnvita saṁnutapuṁṇyamūrtti cikkēśvara nīśvaraṁ natasacīśvaranānagana(.)ndanēśvaraṁ . śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ .
© dharaṇi śrīmaṇimēkhaḷāviḷasitaṁ kṣaumōpamānasphuranmurajinmaṁdiraveṁdu voppu vudu nānāsatvapīyūśasāraramākaustubhapārijātamahījātōccaiśravaśśakra siṁdhuracandrādisamastavastunikarakkādāgaraṁ
pāgaraṁ . varajaṁbūdvīpavaṁbhōdhiya naḍuve sarōjātadaṁtirppugeṁdu suraśaiḷaṁ karṇnikākāradinesevudu tanmēruviṁ teṁkalakkuṁ siriyaṁtābhārataṁ tanmahimukhamu kurākāradiṁ kuṁtaḷaṁ bittarisi
kuṁ tatkuṁtaḷakṣmātaḷadoḍeyaradārādavaryyādavarkkaḷ . kaṁ . Asadṛśayādavakuḷadugdha samudradoḷādavoṁderaḍe nriparatnaṁ pesargoṁbaḍe bahuratnāvasuṁdharāyeṁba teṟade palabarnnegaḷdar .
. ka . Avaroḷagudayisidaṁ grahanivahadoḷinanudayipante mallugibhūpapravaraṁ tajjanapati gudbhavisidanatuḷapratāpa bhillamadēvaṁ . v® . jananutabhillamaṁ paḍedanātmajanaṁ kuḷi śāyu
dhaṁ jayantanananiḷaṁ vrikōdarananatri mrigāṁkananarkkanaṁgarājananavanītaḷaṁ pogaḷe pe ttavolaggada jaitapāḷarāyananatipuṁṇyakāyananajēyananāśritabhāgadēyanaṁ . kṣitipāḷaṁ jaitapāḷaṁ paḍeda maganadēṁ vīranō yādavō
rbbīpatirājyōtpattiśuṁbhatsarasiruhabhavaṁ suprasiddhāṁdhrarājyasthitikṛṣṇaṁ lāṭarājya praḷeyaphaṇidharaṁ gauḷarājyapradīphōddhatavātaṁ cōḷarājyatriṇadahanadavaṁ siṁghaṇa kṣōṇipāḷaṁ . Avanipasiṁga
ṇaṁ baṟeya yādavanē sthirarājyalakṣmiyādavanamṛtāṁśukīrttipatiyādava nūrjita viṣṇubhaktiyādavanabaḷāvaśīkaraṇakāraṇakāmanikāmamūrttiyādavanaThe letter va is written above the line.
khiḷōrbbiguntu neleyādavaneṁdu vudāriyādavaṁ . Ā siṁghaṇana pratāpaveṁtene . paramapayōdhiyeṁba jaladurgadoḷacyutanirddu tārabhūdharagiridurggadoḷgiriśa nirddavaneṁdudantivareṁdaḍiṁ
narasugaḷāva durggadoḷagirddaḍavarggaḍa rāyasiṁghaṇaṁ baresale kappamaṁ tiṟade jīvipa rārbhbhuvanāṁtarāḷadoḷ . baḷavaccōḷanripāḷatūḷapavanaṁ lāṭāṭavīpēṭa kānaḷanaṁgāṁgajatuṁga
bhāḷanayanaṁ pāṁcāḷacaṁcallatāḷilavitraṁ viṣamāṁdhrasiṁdhupatiśuṁbhatkuṁbhajaṁ vī rakēraḷakāḷaṁ jayabhāminībhavanabhāsvatprāṁgaṇaṁ siṁgaṇaṁ . dhāriṇigoṁde be ḻugoḍeyanātane māḍidanārggavuṁtu kaisārada
durggavarggamanadorbbanedōrbbaḷadiṁde koṁḍanēṁ vīrano siṁghaṇaṁ viṣamamaṁḍava khāṁḍavaśakrasūnu bhaṁbhērigabhīraśaiḷapavi dhōrasamudrasamudrakuṁbhajaṁ . tenkaṇa cakravartti paḍedānegaḷaṁ maṇibhaṁḍavellavaṁ suṁkisi
madranaṁ hiḍidu meydeṟegoṁḍu kaḍaṁgi lāḷanirddaṁkada bīḍaniṭṭorasi maṁḍavamaṁ tiṟavēḷdu tējadiṁ jhaṁkidanōvo rāyano niyōgiyo yādavacakri siṁghaṇaṁ . kaṁ . yādavarāyana sauryyaśubhōdayamaṁ pogaḷva
ḍeṁna niṁnaḷaveyadirkkādarade kīrtipoṁ tatpādāṁbhōjōpajīvi bīcana peṁpaṁ . Ātanānvayāvatārameṁtene . ka . Ānaṟeye goṁkanāḍoḷtānesevudu b[Ō] mukūrggaḍalliya ghaṭikāsthānācāryyarppuruṣani
dhānaṁ cikkamana kulaparaṁpareyavarggaḷ . nadigaḷa purusara pūrbbamanadanaṟaṣalike tatta pōdhanakulaveṁbudanidhiyoḷcaṁdramanaṁtudayisidaṁ cikkadēvaneṁba mahātma . śrīnidhi guṇanidhi paramatapōni
dhi cikkaṁge takka satiyādaḷ lakṣmīnidhi saubhāgyanidhi kaḷānidhi cikkauvveyeṁba ramaṇī ratnaṁ . yatimātrame cikkauvveya pati vibhavadinamarapati vivēkada vāṇīpati śāṁta teyiṁ tārāpatiyeṁdabhivarnnisa
lke takkaṁ cikkaṁ . v® . puruṣārtthatrayarūparaṁ tanujaraṁ cikkauvveyuṁ cikkanuṁ harakāruṁṇyade pettareṁba teṟadiṁdaṁ mūvaraṁ pettarādaradiṁ dhārmmika mallikārjjuna nanatyaiśvaryyayuktaṁ guṇābha
raṇaṁ bīcaṇanaṁ bhujābaḷamarunmātaṁganaṁ siṁganaṁ . kaṁ . [Ā] cikkayyana sutaroḷbī cane gaṁbhīrapātranatisucaritraṁ bīcane vīrōdāraṁ bīcane lōkaikamānyaneṁtuṁ dhannyaṁ . v® . trijagaṁ byāvarṇnikuṁ
cikkana piriya magaṁ mallanaṁ mattadaṁtidhvajanaṁ bāppātanuṁ kēvaḷigane śivasadbhaktiyiṁ satyadiṁ dōrvvijeyāvaṣṭaṁbhadiṁ tējadinatuḷabaḷaṁ bīcanaṇnaṁ sumitrātmajanaṁṇnaṁ bhīmanaṁṇnaṁ kamaḷanaya
nanaṇna kaḷāmūḷiyaṇnaṁ . dorevetta siṁganiṁdaṁ hiriyanenippoḷpu hosate bhāgyade maṁtrīśvararenibaranibariṁdaṁ hiriyaṁ jājavara kaṭakadoḷgaḍa bīcaṁ . vṛtta . yenasuṁ gōpige puṭṭi
viṣṇubinadaṁ kaimikku gōpāḷaneṁdenisirppaṁdadi cikkamāṁbikege dēśādhīśvaraṁ puṭṭi neṭṭane vaḍḍabyavahāralīleyoḷe rājasrēṣṭhimārtaṁḍaneṁdenisu
tirddananūnabhāgyaniḷayaṁ dhairyyūcaḷaṁ bīcaṇaṁ . turagamavaiydadaśvapatiyānegaḷe ydada tadgajēśvaraṁ narapatiyāḷasōḍaraṇegeydade rāya
savittutāṁ samuddharisuvudeṁma rājyavivutaṁnavenuttuḍalaṭṭi bēḍutirpparene guṇāḍhya cikkamana bīciganēṁ byavahārimātravē . jananāthaṁ siṁghaṇaṁ bīcana su
caritavaṁ bīcanaiśvaryyamaṁ bīcana maṁtraprauḍhiyaṁ bīcana bhujabaḷamaṁ bīcanudyō gamaṁ bīcana tējasphūrtiyaṁ kaṁḍenage śacivanāgalke takkātanī yōrbbanenutaṁ seṭṭi bīcaṁgo
sadakhiḷa niyōgaṁgaḷa meccikoṭṭaṁ . mātēṁ taṁnāptarirddaṁtatuḷabaḷacamūnātha rirddaṁte maṁtribrātaṁ muṁnuḷḷarirddaṁtenagādātaṁ niyōgakke kāryyakke khaḷgakītaṁ bēḷvātaneṁdaggisi porevanadhīśaṁ ga
ḍēṁ ślāghyanō vikhyātaṁ śrīsiṁhaṇōrbbīśvaranaramaneyoḷbīcadaṁḍādhināthaṁ . yele kēḷ svāmiyaṁ bhrityanaṁ tarave pēḷ śrīyādavādhīśvaraṁge lasaccakravudātta sāhaṇi
samudraṁgalte caṁdraṁ bhujabaḷabhīmaṁge bṛhadbhujāparighadaṁḍaṁ rāyasiṁhvaṁge niścaḷadaṁ ṣṭrāṁkuraveṁdaḍēnadaṭanō daṁḍādhipaṁ bīcaṇa . dhanadoḷbēṟilla taccittada bageyadu bēṟilla sāmrā(ṁ)jyabhō
gaṁ tanagaṁ cakrēśvaraṁgaṁ vivaripaḍadu bēṟalla nōḍāḷadarāḷdanadāreṁdeṁba tadbhēda manaṟiyadaṟiṁ siṁghaṇaṁ baṁdu siṁhvāsanadoḷkuḷḷirdda(ṁ)vaṁ kaimugidu keladoḷoppirddavaṁ maṁtribīcaṁ .
© paḍevaḍe cakravarttiya manaṁbiḍidiṁtadhikāralakṣmiyaṁ paḍevudu bīcanaṁtiravanyanadhi kāriye nōḷpaḍātaniṁdoḍeyana nōḷpa kaṇ nuḍiva nālage koḍuva bhāgyavīva kayyiḍuva su
darśanaṁ piḍiva khaṁḍayavarccisi gelva siṁdhuraṁ . yidirāytīsēne hēḷbīcananaḷavaḍadā nāḍu hēḷbīcanaṁ kokkudu balpiṁ kōṁṭe hēḷbīcanananunayadiṁ kappamaṁ darppa diṁdīyada śatruśrēṇi hēḷbī
cananenutoḍeyaṁ meccuvāḷnaccuvāḷkāryyada kūrāḷkhaḷgadoḷḷāḷ yadukulanṛpanā sthānadoḷbīcidēvaṁ . palavuṁ dēśaṁgaḷa nuṁgida viṣamaviṣaṁ �ṇḍu halvā gila huttakokku
pāṁḍyōraganiraladanērvvaṭṭidāḷtaṭṭidāḷtōḷvaladiṁda naṁjuvallaṁ kaḷadu bisuṭa kaṭāya dāḷpuṭṭedaṁ bhūtaḷanāthaṁ rāyanārāyaṇana subhaṭasauparnnanī bīcidēvaṁ . ghanadarppō
drēkadiṁ bērvvaridudubhayarāyarkkīḷalbāradiṁtītana rājyaśrīyaneṁduṁ mmaḷipa janada durmmṛtyuvaṁ kīḷvavōlcikkana putraṁ taṁna bāhābalade caladinēḷtaṁdu kiḷtikki
tatpāṁḍyana bēraṁ tuṁgabhadrājaḷadoḷagaladaṁ bīcasēnādhināthaṁ . madavadvidviṣṭarauddra kkele naḍeyenutuṁ siṁghaṇaṁ pēḷvuduṁ parbbida bāhāgarbbadu
rbbaṁ sivasiva baḷikēneṁdapeṁ vāyu hottikkida dāvajvāḷe śakraṁ masagisida maruddaṁti kaṁ sāri kāydaṭṭida cakraṁ bā®padēṁ nippasarada kaliyō bīcidaṁḍādhināthaṁ .
© rāyaroḷaṭṭiyūnedeṟegoḷḷane maṁḍaḷikargge durggasiddhāyamanikkiveṁduṟade muttane maṁneyareṁbareṁduvaṁnyāyigaḷeṁdu maṁḍederegoḷḷane siṁghaṇa
rāyamaṁtrikauṁtēya baḷāḍhya bīcanadhikāryyōśatṛge baṁda māryyō . kaṁ . vuccaṁgiyo ddaḍiggēṇperccuvudu gaḍeṁtu bīca niṁna daḷaṁ maiyvecci
naḍadārenimiśavidirccade kaḍuguṁdi kusidu hōytidu citraṁ . vri . muḷidāṁtuddha � dhraghritadiṁ bhūtaṁgaḷōruṁḍu kaydoḷeyalsāgaravē
ḷumaṁ nijayaśaśrīkāṁte tāṁ dāṁṭi kāldoḷeyalkākādiyamartta taṁna hayamaṁ kāvēriyoḷtaṁdu meydoḷadaṁ yūdavarāyamaṁtri dhṛtidhairiyēṁdrācaḷaṁ
bīcaṇaṁ . janapatisiṁghaṇaṁge siriyettida sattigeyaṁte taṁnṛpāḷana nijarājyadoḷubha japarākramanōrvvane daṁḍanāthanōrbbane yadhikāriyōrbbane pasāyitanō
rbbane maṁtrayaktanōrbbane majhabāppu cikkana sutāgraṇi bīcanadēṁ sabhāgyanō . va . Ātana mahāsati yūreṁdaḍe . v® . Eṇipaḍe kāmakāminige rāma
na rāmege sōmanōpa rōhiṇigeṇe Eṁbadoṁdu parakīrtiya meyvaḷeyēke tāne sada guṇavati tāne puṇyavati tāne kaḷāvati tāne sarbbalakṣaṇavati yābī
cana manōhari cāmaladēvi raṁjipaḷ . kaṁ . surapatiyuṁ śaciyuṁ susthirarājyageyva terade sale bīcacamūvaranuṁ cāmaladēviyuvarasutanaṁgeyutirddaḍēvaṇnu pudō . v® . svasti samaMistake for va.
stapraśastisamanvitaṁ yūdavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapratāpacakravartti siṁghaṇadēvarā jyamu ttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamūnamūcaṁdrārkkaṁ salutamire . tatpā dapadmō
pajīvi pracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ bīciseṭṭiyaru nijabhujaśaktiyiṁ maṁtraśaktiyiṁ paḍedu beḷuvalaveraḍaṟunūṟamukhya palanāḍugaḷa duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanege
ydu purikaradoḷe rājyaṁgeyvuttamire . ka . mūtēṁ bīcaṁ bhāgi mahītaḷakalladoḍe siṁga ṇaṁ heddoṟeyiṁdī taḍiya bhūmiyenageṁtā taḍi ninageṁdu
sakalamaṁ niravipanē . va . Ātanāḷva dēśaṁgaḷoḷ . ka . beḷuhigeyeppattuṁ kaṇgoḷipudu navagaṁdhaśāḷivanadiṁ vanadiṁdaḷiyiṁ giḷiyiṁ kaḷakōete.
Digital edition of SII 18.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
